input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.4.3.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.4.3.4
            TITLE: test conduct

            CONTENT:
            rule F.4.3.4: Test Conduct
F.4.3.4 Test Conduct   
a. The Laminate test F.4.3.2 and the Comparison test F.4.3.2e must use the same fixture  
b. The load applicator used to test any panel/tubes as required in this section F.4.3 must 
be:  
• Metallic  
• Radius 50 mm 
c. The load applicator must overhang the test piece to prevent edge loading 
d. Any other material must not be placed between the load applicator and the items on test

final_answer: rule F.4.3.4: Test Conduct F.4.3.4 Test Conduct a. The Laminate test F.4.3.2 and the Comparison test F.4.3.2e must use the same fixture b. The load applicator used to test any panel/tubes as required in this section F.4.3 must be: • Metallic • Radius 50 mm c. The load applicator must overhang the test piece to prevent edge loading d. Any other material must not be placed between the load applicator and the items on test
